name: Daily QA TC Scanner - ClickUp + DeepSeek

nodes.name: Daily Midnight IST
nodes.notes: Fires 18:30 UTC = 00:00 IST daily (timezone Asia/Kolkata).

parameters.jsonOutput:
{
  "CLICKUP_LIST_IDS": [
    "901608730150"
  ],
  "TARGET_STATUSES": [
    "ready for qa",
    "ready for development",
    "in development",
    "story defined"
  ],

}

nodes.name: Set Config
nodes.notes: Central config. AUTO_ADJUST_BATCH=true processes every candidate. RATE_LIMIT_SECONDS paces ClickUp writes. All ClickUp nodes retry on 429.

nodes.name: Expand List IDs
nodes.notes: One item per list id -> Fetch runs once per list.

nodes.name: Fetch Candidate Tickets
nodes.notes: GET PARENT tickets only (subtasks=false), paginated (page -> until last_page). Retries on 429.

nodes.name: Filter Target-Status Candidates
nodes.notes: Flattens ALL pages; throws if pagination truncated; emits top-level tickets in TARGET_STATUSES.

nodes.name: Batch Limiter Dynamic
nodes.notes: AUTO_ADJUST_BATCH=true -> all candidates; else cap MAX_TICKETS_PER_RUN.

nodes.name: Loop Each Ticket
nodes.notes: One ticket per iteration. Loop output = index 1; done (index 0) ends the run.

nodes.name: Get Ticket Detail
nodes.notes: Full ticket: nested subtasks[] + markdown_description (requirement). Retries on 429.

nodes.name: Evaluate Coverage
nodes.notes: hasTCs + thin-desc -> action generate/skip/monitor; carries requirement text.

nodes.name: Filter Needs Generation
nodes.notes: TRUE -> generate. FALSE (covered / thin) -> advance outer loop.

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  model: $('Set Config').first().json.DEEPSEEK_MODEL,
  max_tokens: $('Set Config').first().json.DEEPSEEK_MAX_TOKENS,
  messages: [
    {
      role: 'system',
      content: 'You are a Senior QA Architect with 20+ years of enterprise testing experience.

Generate comprehensive test cases for the given ClickUp ticket, based ONLY on the ticket requirement/description provided.

RETURN ONLY A VALID JSON ARRAY - no markdown fences, no backticks, no preamble, no explanation.

Each test case object MUST have these exact keys:
- tc_id: string (e.g. "TC_001")
- title: string (concise descriptive title)
- type: string (one of: "Smoke", "Functional - Positive", "Functional - Negative", "Security", "Performance", "Non-Functional", "Edge Case", "Regression")
- priority: string (one of: "urgent", "high", "normal", "low")
- module: string (feature area)
- objective: string (what this test verifies)
- preconditions: string (setup required)
- steps: string (numbered test steps)
- test_data: string (input data needed)
- expected_result: string (expected outcome)

Coverage requirements:
- Generate at least ' + $('Set Config').first().json.MIN_TCS + ' test cases, but INCREASE the count until EVERY scenario category is covered - never stop at the minimum if coverage is incomplete.
- MUST include all types: Smoke, Functional Positive, Functional Negative, Security, Performance, Non-Functional/Edge Case, Regression.
- Priority mix roughly: 25% urgent, 35% high, 25% normal, 15% low.
- Every TC must be specific, actionable and independently executable.
- Security TCs: token tampering, PII exposure, auth bypass, injection.
- Performance TCs: load, concurrency, response-time thresholds.
- Edge TCs: null/boundary values, rapid repeated actions.
- Regression TCs: verify existing flows remain unaffected.

Return ONLY the JSON array.'
    },
    {
      role: 'user',
      content: 'Generate comprehensive test cases for this ticket:

Ticket: ' + $json.task_name + '
Status: ' + $json.status + '

Full Requirement / Description:
' + ($json.requirement || '').substring(0, 8000) + '

Return ONLY a valid JSON array.'
    }
  ]
}) }}

nodes.name: DeepSeek Generate TCs
nodes.notes: DeepSeek (OpenAI-compatible). Requirement from Evaluate Coverage. Model from config.

nodes.name: Parse TCs from DeepSeek
nodes.notes: choices[0].message.content -> per-TC items; sets tc_name = '[TC] <id> - <title>'.

nodes.name: Filter Parse Errors
nodes.notes: TRUE -> Loop Each TC. FALSE -> advance outer loop.

nodes.name: Loop Each TC
nodes.notes: One TC per iteration (loop = index 1). Done (index 0) -> Verify Coverage.

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  name: $json.tc_name || (($('Set Config').first().json.TC_PREFIX || '[TC]') + ' ' + ($json.tc_id || 'TC') + ' - ' + ($json.title || 'Test Case')),
  parent: $json.parent_task_id,
  assignees: $json.assignee_id ? [parseInt($json.assignee_id)] : [],
  priority: $json.priority === 'urgent' ? 1 : $json.priority === 'high' ? 2 : $json.priority === 'normal' ? 3 : 4,
  markdown_description: '## Test Case Details
' +
    '**TC ID:** ' + ($json.tc_id || '') + '
' +
    '**Module:** ' + ($json.module || '') + '
' +
    '**Type:** ' + ($json.type || '') + '
' +
    '**Priority:** ' + ($json.priority || '') + '
' +
    '**Objective:** ' + ($json.objective || '') + '

' +
    '## Preconditions
' + ($json.preconditions || 'None') + '

' +
    '## Steps
' + ($json.steps || '') + '

' +
    '## Test Data
' + ($json.test_data || 'N/A') + '

' +
    '## Expected Result
' + ($json.expected_result || '')
}) }}

nodes.name: Create TC Subtask in ClickUp
nodes.notes: Creates a [TC] subtask under the parent. Retries on 429 (5x, 5s backoff).

nodes.name: Wait Rate Limit
nodes.notes: Paces ClickUp writes by RATE_LIMIT_SECONDS (default 2s). Do not remove.

nodes.name: Verify Coverage
nodes.notes: Re-fetch the ticket's subtasks to confirm generated [TC] exist. Retries on 429 (5x, 5s backoff).

nodes.name: Assert Coverage
nodes.notes: Generated [TC] vs existing. All present -> coverage_ok. Missing + retries left -> re-emit. Missing + no retries -> THROW.

nodes.name: Filter Coverage OK
nodes.notes: TRUE -> advance outer loop. FALSE (missing) -> recreate.

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  name: $json.tc_name || (($('Set Config').first().json.TC_PREFIX || '[TC]') + ' ' + ($json.tc_id || 'TC') + ' - ' + ($json.title || 'Test Case')),
  parent: $json.parent_task_id,
  assignees: $json.assignee_id ? [parseInt($json.assignee_id)] : [],
  priority: $json.priority === 'urgent' ? 1 : $json.priority === 'high' ? 2 : $json.priority === 'normal' ? 3 : 4,
  markdown_description: '## Test Case Details
' +
    '**TC ID:** ' + ($json.tc_id || '') + '
' +
    '**Module:** ' + ($json.module || '') + '
' +
    '**Type:** ' + ($json.type || '') + '
' +
    '**Priority:** ' + ($json.priority || '') + '
' +
    '**Objective:** ' + ($json.objective || '') + '

' +
    '## Preconditions
' + ($json.preconditions || 'None') + '

' +
    '## Steps
' + ($json.steps || '') + '

' +
    '## Test Data
' + ($json.test_data || 'N/A') + '

' +
    '## Expected Result
' + ($json.expected_result || '')
}) }}

nodes.name: Recreate Missing TCs
nodes.notes: Re-create [TC] subtasks verification found missing. Retries on 429 (5x, 5s backoff).

nodes.name: Wait (Recreate)
nodes.notes: Paces recreate writes by RATE_LIMIT_SECONDS, then re-verify.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: $json.DEEPSEEK_MODEL, max_tokens: $json.DEEPSEEK_MAX_TOKENS, messages: [ {role:'system', content:'You are an SRE assistant. Classify the n8n workflow failure. Return ONLY a JSON object with keys: category (string), is_auto_fixable (boolean), suggested_action (string), human_summary (string). No markdown, no fences.'}, {role:'user', content:'Failed node: ' + ($json.failed_node||'') + '\nError: ' + ($json.error_message||'') } ] }) }}
